mimo.reason: OpenCode Go exposes MiMo V2.5 under an account route not represented by the reviewed Zen catalog; preserve the deployed free-beta route and zero proxy price until catalog parity exists.

mimo-pro.reason: MiMo V2.5 Pro has no reviewed Zen catalog entry; preserve the deployed route and explicit DeepSeek V4 Pro proxy price pending provider-published pricing.
